message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for DataFrame.isna + notna (3 cases)

Append 3 live-pandas oracle tests covering DataFrame-level
null-projection methods (mirroring the Series.isna/notna tests added
in 938e0c8):

- isna_basic: 3-row 2-column frame with mixed-position nulls
- notna_basic: same input, inverse boolean projection
- isna_no_nulls: int+float frame with no missing values

Each test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle (which calls
frame.isna()/.notna() and emits dataframe_to_json), runs the Rust
DataFrame.isna()/.notna(), and asserts parity via
compare_dataframe_expected. DataFrameIsNa / DataFrameNotNa are
already wired through the Frame response branch; this fills the
live-oracle test gap.

[bd-frankenpandas-0vsga]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
